meta.title: Turn PRDs into Beautiful Code Engineers Love
meta.description: Transform product requirements into intelligent development plans and production-ready code. Our AI-powered platform generates type-safe, maintainable code that follows best practices,  helping engineering teams ship faster without sacrificing quality.

features.title: From Requirements to Production Code
features.description: Our intelligent platform transforms your PRDs into actionable plans and generates beautiful, maintainable code that your engineers will actually want to work with.

items.title: Intelligent Plan Generation
items.description: Automatically transform PRDs into comprehensive technical plans with architecture decisions, component breakdowns, and implementation strategies tailored to your stack.

items.title: Production-Ready Code
items.description: Generate type-safe, tested, and documented code that follows industry best practices. Every line is crafted with maintainability and scalability in mind.

items.title: Engineer-Friendly Output
items.description: Code that engineers love to work with—readable, well-structured, and consistent. No brittle templates or messy generation artifacts.

items.title: Seamless Integration
items.description: Works with your existing tools and workflows. Support for React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Prisma, and modern development stacks.

stats.title: Accelerating Engineering Velocity
stats.description: Join thousands of engineering teams shipping faster with AI-powered code generation. Our platform has generated over 10 million lines of production code, helping teams reduce development  time by 70% while maintaining code quality that passes peer review.

items.title: Game-changing for our velocity
items.description: We went from PRD to working prototype in hours instead of weeks. The generated code is cleaner than what some of our junior devs write, and it passes our strict code review standards.

items.title: Finally, AI that understands architecture
items.description: This isn't just code generation—it's architectural thinking. The plans are thoughtful, the code is production-ready, and my team actually enjoys working with the output.

items.title: The code quality blew me away
items.description: Type-safe, tested, documented, and following all our conventions. It's like having a senior engineer who never gets tired and always follows best practices.

items.title: Reduced our sprint planning by 80%
items.description: We feed in the PRD and get back a complete technical plan with component breakdowns, API contracts, and even implementation estimates. Our planning meetings are now 30 minutes instead of 3 hours.

faq.title: Common Questions from Engineering Teams
faq.description: Learn how our platform helps you go from requirements to production-ready code while maintaining the quality and control your team needs. We've answered the most common questions about code generation, customization, and integration with your existing workflows.

items.question: How is the generated code different from other AI tools?
items.answer: Our platform generates production-ready, type-safe code that follows modern best practices and architectural patterns. Unlike generic AI tools, we understand full-stack development, monorepo structures, and enterprise patterns. Every component is tested, documented, and designed for maintainability.

items.question: Can I customize the code generation to match our style?
items.answer: Absolutely. Configure your tech stack, coding conventions, component patterns, and architectural preferences. The platform learns from your existing codebase and generates code that feels native to your project.

items.question: What technologies and frameworks do you support?
items.answer: We support modern JavaScript/TypeScript stacks including Next.js, React, Node.js, Turborepo, Prisma, tRPC, Tailwind CSS, and more. Our platform works with popular design systems like shadcn/ui and integrates with services like Clerk, Stripe, and Vercel.

items.question: How does pricing work?
items.answer: We offer flexible plans based on your team size and usage. Start with our free tier to generate up to 10 plans per month, or upgrade to Pro for unlimited plans, custom templates, and priority support. Enterprise plans include dedicated infrastructure and custom integrations.

items.question: Is the generated code truly production-ready?
items.answer: Yes. All generated code includes TypeScript types, unit tests, error handling, accessibility features, and comprehensive documentation. Our customers regularly ship generated code to production after standard code review processes.

cta.title: Ship Beautiful Code Faster
cta.description: Join engineering teams at startups and enterprises who are shipping production features 10x faster. Transform your PRDs into intelligent plans and production-ready code in minutes. Start building today with our free tier—no credit card required.
